## Summary

## Type

- [ ] New example
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (ruff lint + format)
- [ ] New examples follow the `examples/{slug}/` structure and stay small
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal data committed (`.env` / `data/` stay gitignored)
- [ ] Conventional commit title (e.g. `feat(examples/27-self-rag): add workflow`)
- [ ] Targets the `dev` branch
